response.justification: Bogdan has solid breadth across ~17 years of software engineering and genuine entrepreneurial experience through GISCollective, but the role demands a director-level AI strategist with deep, demonstrated expertise in cloud and AI platforms at scale. His AI exposure is limited to recent agentic tooling work (MCP generators at re:cinq since April 2025) and falls well short of the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms' the role requires. There is no evidence of advising strategic customers, shaping organizational technical direction, or operating at the principal/director IC level this position describes.
strengths: ~17 years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective open-source platform and community knowledge-sharing (workshops, conference talks)
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI workflows and MCP framework development at re:cinq
concerns: No deep AI/ML expertise — AI involvement is recent (2025), shallow, and tooling-level rather than strategic or research-grounded
No demonstrated experience advising enterprise customers or partners on cloud/AI adoption at a strategic level
No cloud platform specialization at scale; primarily a product software developer without director-level IC scope or organizational influence
